data.content:
Done. All four `DateTime.UtcNow` calls in `CouponService.cs` are now replaced with `_timeProvider.GetUtcNow().UtcDateTime`. Changes:

- Added `TimeProvider _timeProvider` field
- Constructor accepts `TimeProvider` via DI
- `CreateCoupon`, `IsValid`, and `TimeUntilExpiry` all use the injected provider

`AuditLogger.cs` was left untouched as requested. In your tests you can now inject `FakeTimeProvider` to control time.
